crime.value: Supernatural/criminal conspiracy using a phantom hound to kill Baskerville heirs
crime.quote: He could not hope to frighten Sir Henry to death as he had done the old uncle with his bogie hound.

victim.value: The old Baskerville uncle, killed by fright from the hound; Sir Henry as intended next victim due to inheritance
victim.quote: He could not hope to frighten Sir Henry to death as he had done the old uncle with his bogie hound.

closed_world.value: The Baskerville estate and surrounding moors, with limited cast of local residents and visitors
closed_world.quote: Stapleton was the cause of the interruption. He was running wildly towards them

culprit_and_motive.value: Stapleton, motivated by claiming the Baskerville inheritance by eliminating heirs in the succession line
culprit_and_motive.quote: If Stapleton came into the succession, how could he explain the fact that he, the heir, had been living

resolution.value: Holmes deduces Stapleton's method using a real savage hound to create the supernatural illusion and kill heirs
resolution.quote: The beast was savage and half-starved. If its appearance did not frighten its victim to death

investigator.value: Sherlock Holmes as the primary detective, with Dr. Watson as his assistant and narrator
investigator.quote: Well, Watson, what do you make of it?

suspect_architecture.value: Primary suspect Stapleton (motive: inheritance, means: trained hound, opportunity: local knowledge), secondary suspects implied but not fully detailed in excerpt
suspect_architecture.quote: If Stapleton came into the succession, how could he explain the fact that he, the heir, had been living unannounced

red_herring.value: Stapleton's cover as naturalist with butterfly-net, appearing innocent while actually stalking victims
red_herring.quote: It was Stapleton with his butterfly-net. He was very much closer to the pair than I was

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence of walking stick analyzed jointly by Holmes and Watson, with reasoning shown to reader
clue_fairness.quote: Let me hear you reconstruct the man by an examination of it.

social_world.value: Aristocratic inheritance system with landed gentry (baronet, succession rights) and professional medical hierarchy
social_world.quote: To James Mortimer, M.R.C.S., from his friends of the C.C.H.

reveal_mechanic.value: Deductive reasoning from physical evidence - walking stick wear patterns reveal country practitioner's habits
reveal_mechanic.quote: The thick-iron ferrule is worn down, so it is evident that he has done a great amount of walking

media_and_audience.value: Supernatural folklore of hound used to mask deliberate murder, exploiting local beliefs about family curse
media_and_audience.quote: He could not hope to frighten Sir Henry to death as he had done the old uncle with his bogie hound

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle the hound of the baskervilles 1
